extract: Bulk Up (Japanese: ビルドアップ Build Up) is a non-damaging Fighting-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM08 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM30 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR48 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM064 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM011 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
